g.text: SGD Update Mechanics: p.data -= lr * p.grad

ul.li: If we increase $p$ by $\epsilon$, loss increases by $0.80 \times \epsilon$
If we decrease $p$ by $\epsilon$, loss decreases by $0.80 \times \epsilon$

div.p: Rule: To reduce loss, move in the negative gradient direction.
Result: Smooth descent towards local minimum.
Status: ✗ OVERSHOT! Jumps across the valley.
If we used p = p - lr * grad:
